subcodes.first_line: This newspaper has been published in the West by a person from abroad, and a detailed chapter concerning this Cause hath been written therein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این روزنامه را در غرب شخصی از خارج طبع نموده و فصلی مفصل در این امر مرقوم
subcodes.subjects: @newspapers and the media; publications, @review of publications, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
